homeHeroSubtitle: Snap a photo, pin the location, and let CityLink route your report directly to the right municipal department. Radical transparency for modern governance.
homeWhySubtitle: The most advanced platform for transparent civic governance.
homeFeatureRoutingDesc: No more manual follow-ups. Our system identifies your location and issue type in seconds, then sends it straight to the right city officer.
homeFeatureLiveDesc: You can clearly see what is happening after you submit a complaint. Status updates are shown step by step, so there is no confusion.
homeFeatureLivePendingDesc: Report received and queued for verification.
homeFeatureLiveVerifiedDesc: Admin confirms the report is valid.
homeFeatureLiveProgressDesc: Field team assigned and work has started.
homeFeatureEvidenceDesc: Every report includes exact location details. City teams can open the ticket, follow the map pin, and reach the correct place quickly.
homeFeatureEvidencePoint1: Photo and location are stored together.
homeFeatureEvidencePoint2: No need to call and explain directions repeatedly.
homeFeatureVerifiedDesc: A complaint is marked resolved only after field proof is uploaded. This keeps the process honest and easy to trust for every citizen.
homeFeatureVerifiedPoint1: Before and after photo evidence is attached.
homeFeatureVerifiedPoint2: Closure time is recorded in the ticket history.
homeFeatureVerifiedPoint3: You can reopen the issue if the fix is incomplete.
homeHowSubtitle: A radically simple process to improve your neighborhood.
homeHowStep1Desc: Take a quick photo of the pothole, broken light, or garbage. Add a brief description. We automatically handle the exact GPS location.
homeHowStep2Desc: The moment you submit, CityLink's routing engine instantly assigns the ticket to the specific local officer responsible for that area.
homeHowStep3Desc: Watch the status update live. When the work is done, you'll receive a notification with a verified photo of the completed repair.
homeFooterTagline: Empowering the citizens of Tamil Nadu to build cleaner, safer, and smarter cities through transparent civic governance.
homeFooterCopyright: CityLink Tamil Nadu. All rights reserved.
authFirstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
authPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
